case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY VS. COLIBRI MEXICAN BISTRO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-14-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY'S REPRESENTATIVE: HAROLD TICKTIN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. SEE SIGNATURE ON RETURNED COURT CERTIFIED MAIL POSTCARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED OCT-08-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COLIBRI MEXICAN BISTRO C/O EDWARDO RALIO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS AND SECURITY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKTIN, MANAGER. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED ORDE FOR DETAILS)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,090.00 FILED BY UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY AS TO DEFENDANT COLIBRI MEXICAN BISTRO C/O EDWARDO RALIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY AS TO DEFENDANT COLIBRI MEXICAN BISTRO C/O EDWARDO RALIO
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEBRUARY 14, 2017 AT 10:00 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 8/31/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
